payload.query: An increasing number of authoritarian regimes rely on institutions typically associated with democratic systems (political parties, legislatures, and elections). Why do authoritarian regimes establish such institutions? What objectives do they serve? Do they pose a threat to regime survival or promote stability? Critically examine the literature on the role of such institutions in modern authoritarian politics.
